prompt: album cover art featuring a confident plus-size Black woman with glasses, natural curly hair, red blazer, warm brown skin, teal neon halo ring behind her head, same character as the Debra AI assistant avatar. She is wearing headphones around her neck, eyes closed, peaceful expression, standing in a zen garden where a glowing stream of binary code flows like water through rocks and cherry blossom trees. Lo-fi chill hop aesthetic meets cyberpunk. Soft morning mist, muted pastels with cyan and purple neon accents. Text at top reads IN THE STREAM in clean minimal white font. Below that in smaller text JONATHAN WILSON feat. DEBRA. Text at bottom reads THE HAIKU REMIX in subtle gold lettering. Square album format, digital painting style, contemplative yet powerful
